title: Smooth GUI Animations
description: Adds a beautiful and customizable opening animation to ALL interfaces in the game
body:
# Smooth GUI Animations

🎯 **Turn boring static Minecraft interfaces into lively and dynamic ones!**

## ✨ Features:
- 🔥 **Smooth zoom animations** for all interfaces
- 🎮 Works with inventory, crafting tables, chests, menus and other GUIs
- ⚡ Lightweight mod with no performance loss
- 🎨 Natural easing animations for a pleasant user experience
- 🔧 Compatible with most mods

## 🚀 What will change:
- **Inventory (E)** - smooth appearance with scaling
- **Menu (ESC)** - beautiful opening and closing
- **Workbenches/Stoves** - animated appearance of interfaces
- **And much more!**

## 💡 Why you should install it:
- ✅ Improves the visual experience without changing the gameplay
- ✅ Compatible with OptiFine, Sodium, and other optimization mods
- ✅ Does not affect performance
- ✅ Easy installation - no settings required!

---

**Refresh your Minecraft with professional interface animations! 🎉**
